description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior features a mix of dark and natural tones, with large glass windows on the front facade providing ample natural light and a contemporary look. The house is surrounded by a landscaped area with several mature trees and a curved stone pathway leading to the main entrance. The front entryway is slightly elevated, with a small porch area and steps, and the house appears to have a single story. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with larger panes on the front and smaller ones on the sides. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, integration with nature, and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a landscaped yard with mature trees and a curved stone path.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, porch, and the curved stone pathway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view with trees partially obscuring the house, showing the flat roof and some window placement.
description_view_2: Rear view with dense tree coverage, limited visibility of windows and back facade details.
description_view_3: Opposite front view highlighting the flat roof, front windows, and the continuation of the stone pathway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and large glass door, framed by minimalist landscaping.
